passedAssertions: VAL-VP-001: ambient_available() returns (False, reason) when sounddevice missing
VAL-VP-002: ambient_available() returns (False, reason) when mlx_whisper missing
VAL-VP-003: AmbientService.get_transcript() returns rolling buffer capped at TRANSCRIPT_MAXLEN
VAL-VP-004: GET /ambient/transcript returns segments and count
VAL-VP-005: GET /ambient/status includes available and reason fields
VAL-VP-006: GET /dictation/status returns running and available
VAL-VP-007: GET /voice/config returns config with defaults
VAL-VP-008: PUT /voice/config partial update preserves unset fields
VAL-VP-009: load_voice_config merges disk values with defaults
VAL-VP-010: save_voice_config creates parent dirs and writes JSON
VAL-VP-011: ambient autostart skipped when ambient_available returns False
VAL-VP-012: route_voice_command dispatches to registered handlers
notes: All ML/audio deps mocked in CI — sounddevice, mlx_whisper, Quartz stubs in conftest.py.
test_server.py replaces state.ambient with MagicMock; fixtures in test_server_endpoints.py and test_voice_pipeline.py now reset to real AmbientService instances to prevent cross-test contamination.
Ambient autostart tests mock state.ambient.start() to avoid spawning real capture threads.
